label: crew-cli
description: crewswarm's native CLI with intelligent routing, sandbox workflow, and cross-repo context. Full agent orchestration with safety gates, review loops, and persistent memory.
_note: crew-cli command integration updated (uses 'crew chat' as of March 2026)
installCmd: cd ~/Desktop/crewswarm/crew-cli && npm install && npm run build
notes: crew-cli is crewswarm's native execution engine. Unlike external CLIs (OpenCode, Cursor), it has direct access to the full agent roster, shared memory, and gateway routing. Use for complex multi-agent tasks, planning, and orchestration.
